where.if: AND (course_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR course_code LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR instructor LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM tb_training_course
ORDER BY is_active DESC, course_code ASC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_training_course (course_code, course_name, category, cat_type, target_audience, duration_hours, cycle, legal_required, instructor, description, date_start, date_end, location, mode, status, total_seats, current_seats, law_basis, is_active, created_by, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{courseCode}, #{courseName}, #{category}, #{catType}, #{targetAudience}, #{durationHours}, #{cycle}, #{legalRequired}, #{instructor}, #{description}, #{dateStart}, #{dateEnd}, #{location}, #{mode}, #{status}, #{totalSeats}, #{currentSeats}, #{lawBasis}, #{isActive}, #{createdBy}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_training_course SET course_code = #{courseCode}, course_name = #{courseName}, category = #{category}, cat_type = #{catType}, target_audience = #{targetAudience}, duration_hours = #{durationHours}, cycle = #{cycle}, legal_required = #{legalRequired}, instructor = #{instructor}, description = #{description}, date_start = #{dateStart}, date_end = #{dateEnd}, location = #{location}, mode = #{mode}, status = #{status}, total_seats = #{totalSeats}, current_seats = #{currentSeats}, law_basis = #{lawBasis}, is_active = #{isActive}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
